title: Live staged detect live LLM opt-in proof (per-step)
problem: Staged spine uses mock LLM for detect-contradictions after live OpenAlex ingest. Pre-ticket-216 GO defines a per-step live Ollama detect proof on rank-1 staged source with mock upstream and domain seed.
acceptance_criteria: Live staged detect fallthrough bypasses staged-fetch auto-mock when env gate set.
Opt-in pytest (live_network + live_smoke) proves domain seed + discover→ingest→mock upstream→live detect on temp DB.
Default pytest and staged orchestrator remain mock-only.
non_goals: Live extract/link/build + live detect in same pytest.
rollback_plan: Revert fallthrough gate, test, and ci deselect entry.
category: Phase 3 / live LLM / staged spine product-risk
